title: Vampire Survivors
edition_pinned: Vampire Survivors Patch 1.0 full release (poncle / Luca Galante; left Steam Early Access 20 October 2022) — auto-attack + gold meta as design-canonical; later DLC character packs are out of pin.
moat: Movement-only control with timed auto-attacks turns positioning and upgrade picks into the whole skill axis.

loop_skeleton.description: Move through a timed stage while weapons fire on cooldowns, collect XP gems to choose weapons and passives, evolve combos, die or hit the stage timer, then spend gold between runs to unlock characters and permanent PowerUps (weapons and stages also unlock via challenges).

depth_mechanisms.name: auto-attack strips aim
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Attacks fire on fixed timers without a fire button. Targeting is weapon-specific (facing cones, orbits, area pulses, directed projectiles) so player skill is position, pathing, and reading attack cadence — not twin-stick aim.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If manual aiming is required for every shot, the exercise-bike and chat-while-playing use case (creator intent) fails because attention cannot leave the aim stick.

depth_mechanisms.name: level-up build fork
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Each level presents a random subset of weapons and passives. Evolutions require specific weapon plus passive pairs at max rank, so runs diverge into named combos rather than pure stat stacking.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If every level-up is a free choice of any unlock with no evolution recipes, runs stop forming named weapon-plus-passive identities and second-session combo experiments drop.

depth_mechanisms.name: gold meta unlock ladder
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Gold earned in runs buys permanent PowerUp upgrades and unlocks characters between sessions; many weapons, stages, and modifiers unlock by completing challenges rather than by gold purchase alone. Free re-spec of PowerUps lets players reallocate gold paths without a new save.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If gold cannot buy permanent unlocks between runs, a failed run produces no lasting progress and return after first death falls.

feel_signature: A move commit repositions the character while weapons auto-fire on timers; a level-up pause forces a pick among offered upgrades that rewrite the next minutes of swarm control.
second_session_answer: Players return to spend gold on PowerUps and try a newly unlocked character or challenge-unlocked weapon evolution path, not to re-watch cutscenes.
packaging_lessons: Inference: ship one stage, a handful of weapons, and gold unlocks before multiplayer or narrative arcs — creator designed for short bike sessions.
Keep attack automatic from day one so the skill surface is pathing and build picks only.
anti_lessons: Do not add real-money gacha to the gold ladder — the gambling-inspired balance is about run reward pacing, not cash shops.
Do not copy survivor-likes by only adding auto-fire to an existing twin-stick without timed swarm pressure and evolution recipes.

system_bom.note: move → auto-hit → XP gem → level pick is the in-run cycle that either ends in death or timer survival
weapons, passives, and stage chests accelerate builds; chests and evolutions change swarm-control power mid-run
gems from kills drive the level-up cadence that creates decision pauses
level-ups are the primary decision points that fork the run build
gold PowerUps and character unlocks persist across deaths; challenge unlocks also expand weapons/stages so failed runs still buy permanent progress
death ends the run but converts gold; timer survival is the stage win condition
gold is the between-run currency for characters and PowerUps; weapons commonly unlock via challenges

citations.claim: Edition pin: full Mac/Windows release 20 October 2022 after Early Access; gold between sessions unlocks characters and persistent power-ups; challenges unlock stages, weapons, characters.
Edition pin: Patch 1.0 / content-complete Steam release date 20 October 2022 ends Early Access baseline for this card.
Edition pin announcement: full 1.0 release scheduled for 20 October 2022, ending Early Access baseline for this card.
Moat and auto-attack: Galante designed attacks as automatic so the player could concentrate on something else (bike, chat).
Auto-attack strips aim: player moves while weapons fire without a fire button; skill is pathing through swarms.
Level-up build fork: XP levels present upgrade choices; weapons and power-ups define the run.
Evolution recipes: maxed weapons combine with specific passives into evolved forms that rewrite the late-run kit.
Gold meta unlock ladder (narrowed): between sessions, accumulated gold spends on new characters and persistent power-ups; challenges unlock additional stages, weapons, and characters.
Gold meta re-spec: PowerUps can be reset so gold paths can be reallocated without a new save.
Feel signature: move while weapons auto-fire; level-ups unlock weapons and upgrades under a timed survival goal.
Feel signature and Pac-Man power cadence inspiration (safe → empowered → safe) cited by creator.
Second-session answer: permanent unlocks and new characters structure return after death.
Loot BOM: stage chests and item drops accelerate mid-run power and evolution access.
Loot loop service: evolutions and chests change swarm-control capacity, not only inventory count.
XP and leveling BOM: gems from kills create level-up decision pauses.
Meta-progression and economy BOM: gold PowerUps and unlocks persist across runs.
Win-loss-death BOM: death ends the stage run while gold converts to permanent progress; survival timer defines stage success.
Play-loop BOM: move, auto-attack, collect, level, survive is the in-run cycle.
Packaging lesson 1 (labeled Inference): short automatic sessions with gold unlocks match creator bike/chat intent before multiplayer arcs.
Packaging lesson 2: automatic attack from the start is load-bearing for the skill surface.
Anti-lesson cash gacha: gambling-inspired balance is about reward pacing inside free gold loops, not real-money gacha.
Anti-lesson auto-fire-only clone: evolution recipes and timed swarm pressure are part of the depth, not only automatic fire.
